title: Malformed planner output fuzzing
description: Synthetic malformed planner outputs should not silently corrupt the simulator state.
first_talk: I need you to help test a brittle parser.
player: A synthetic test user used only for parser fuzzing.
scene: The scenario exists to trigger structured-output parsing edge cases.
task: exercise malformed Change fields, missing headers, and invalid formatting

expected_good_behavior: The simulator should raise controlled errors or use explicit defaults.
